metadata.lyrics:
[00:21.97] You saw me standing by the wall corner of a main street
[00:31.18] And the lights are flashing on your window sill
[00:39.64] All alone ain't much fun so you're looking for the thrill
[00:48.23] And you know just what it takes and where to go
[00:56.99] Don't say a prayer for me now
[01:01.37] Save it 'til the morning after
[01:04.43] No, don't say a prayer for me now
[01:09.97] Save it 'til the morning after
[01:14.51] 
[01:29.72] Feel the breeze deep on the inside, look you down into your well
[01:38.96] If you can you'll see the world in all his fire
[01:47.20] Take a chance like all dreamers can't find another way
[01:55.77] You don't have to dream it all, just live a day

[03:15.93] But fear is in your soul
[03:19.64] Some people call it a one night stand but we can call it paradise
